utterances.speaker: Supervisor
utterances.text: So basically this is very easy . You read from the script and try to sell as much toner as you possibly can .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Okay , I can do that ! Oh , by the way , I love my office .

utterances.speaker: Supervisor
utterances.text: Why do not we do a trial run .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh okay . Umm , all right . Hi , this is Phoebe from Empire Office Supplies , can I speak to your supply manager please ?

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Umm , okay I would like to talk to you about your toner needs .
